name: Teatime Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. With a pastry blender or two knives, cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg, then stir in buttermilk and vanilla.
4. Using a fork, add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients to form a soft dough. Gather into a ball.
5. Turn out onto lightly floured surface; knead lightly 10 times.
6. With lightly floured hands, pat dough into a half-inch thick round.
7. Using 2-1/2 inch cookie cutter, cut rounds of dough, gathering scraps together until all dough is used up.
8. Place the rounds on a lightly greased baking sheet.
9. Bake in an oven set to 425°F (220°C) for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown and risen.
10. Let cool on wire racks. Serve warm.
